name: Feedee Stats | Sim II (Fix)
description:
CW: Fetish Content

The improved feederism simulator. Feed Ami all she can eat... till immobility. The game has quality and accurate stats every message to measure her growth journey.

Second edition:

Fully redesigned A.I. code...

-- Fixed the bot, portions of bot description was deleted, now replaced --

original bot

CW: Feederism: this Chat-bot is quite gross and disturbing with extreme weight fetish content. If you're not interested in that, please don't disturb yourself.

This bot is meant for the sole purpose of fetishized weight gain. She wont stop getting bigger...

Fixes and Cheats:

  • Sometimes Ami's stats malfunction, to fix, immediately update message to include stats or remind the bot to include weight and calorie stats.

  • To increase weight manually, simply incorporate it into the narrative "*{{char}} gains 40lbs after stuffing herself for 2 days...* How much do you weigh now, {{char}}?"

  • To make her gain weight naturally, simply feed her food.

  • If her stats are not lining up, or her overall roleplay is not changing... say: "Apply your weight consequences"
